column1: Luis Arraez headlines today’s Beat The Streak picks with his signature steady bat and a prime leadoff role on the road, boasting a robust 73.1% chance to notch a hit against German Marquez. The matchup leans in Arraez’s favor, and his reliable contact profile makes him the clear-cut top option. Not far behind, Jakob Marsee brings a similar top-of-the-order presence and a favorable home park boost, facing a hittable Erick Fedde with the platoon edge. Brandon Nimmo and Trea Turner also deserve quick nods, each leading off with strong matchup flags and plenty of upside for streak chasers.
